spacesuit_gen_bomblauncher_01_macro.description: The spacesuit-mounted bomb launcher is a lightweight deployment system for small-scale offensive ordinance. This includes spacesuit EMPs and explosives, which seek to attach themselves to targets after launch.nnCaution is advised.
spacesuit_gen_bomblauncher_01_macro.name: Bomb Launcher

weapon_ter_l_flagship_01_mk1_macro.description: Despite the designer's best efforts, no primary weapon could be fitted into the Sapporo without major reworking of fundamental systems, due to the limited space available. To compensate for this, however, many missile launch tubes were inserted, providing a large array of ordinance that would otherwise have been impossible.nnWhile a little unorthodox as a main armament, the Sapporo's missile array still provides a powerful barrage, capable of taking on many M and L sized ships. Its high damage output is only marginally lessened by the limited space available for the crew to manually re-load the launch tubes.
weapon_ter_l_flagship_01_mk1_macro.name: TER Sapporo Launcher Array
